variant_name: 高父 — 婚前允婚与婚堂送嫁时的隐忍父亲
trigger: 在第三次提亲压力下，高父最终同意婚事，并在婚前叮嘱女儿受委屈便和离回家；婚礼当日以父亲身份送女出嫁，内心并不真正轻松。

appearance_delta.face: 表面维持礼数与平稳，实则眼神沉郁，不见嫁女喜色
appearance_delta.body: 举止稳重但略显僵硬，像强行支撑体面完成仪式
appearance_delta.hair: 束冠严整，符合婚礼场面礼仪
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 温厚中带明显不舍，已提前为女儿准备退路，护女态度更明确

costume_override.outfit: 适合婚礼礼仪场合的正式官员或家主礼服，较平日更庄重

visual_reference: middle-aged ancient Chinese father at his daughter's wedding, refined scholarly face with worried wrinkles, neatly crowned black-and-gray hair, wearing a formal dark official ceremonial robe in muted teal and brown tones, standing in a red wedding hall with restrained sorrow rather than joy, realistic historical drama style, dignified but reluctant father sending off daughter
